attributes.content:
## Overview

The Prescription card gives the workspace a structured home for medication prescription with drug, dosage, frequency, prescriber, and refill status.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Prescription acts as a canonical operational record. It keeps important facts, state changes, timestamps, and linked parties in one place so downstream workflows, approvals, and reporting can all rely on the same source of truth.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Document]]** -- Prescription can link to longer-form supporting content when a lightweight card needs deeper context.
- **[[Report]]** -- Prescription can feed rollups and summaries that surface trends, status, or outcomes.
- **[[Trigger]]** -- Changes to Prescription can fire automation, and automation can also create or update Prescription.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Prescription can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Contact]]** -- Prescription often needs a person-level reference for ownership, communication, or accountability.
- **[[Health Record]]** -- Health Record can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Prescription.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Prescription as the structured home for medication prescription with drug, dosage, frequency, prescriber, and refill status and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Prescription when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Prescription stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
